name: KSA_GOV
description: NCA CSCC: cybersecurity strategy, risk management, IT project security, periodic audit, and human resources security for critical systems.

name: KSA_INF
description: Compute hardening, virtual network isolation, storage encryption with CMK, and secure boot for cloud infrastructure.

name: KSA_PLA
description: API gateway security, database security controls, container image scanning, and serverless function security.

name: KSA_DAT
description: Data classification per NCA and NDMO, data masking, data residency within Saudi Arabia, and data retention and deletion.

name: KSA_IAM
description: Identity federation, just-in-time privileged access management, service account security, and periodic access reviews.

name: KSA_NET
description: DDoS protection, WAF with OWASP rules, private endpoints for PaaS services, and network traffic monitoring.

name: KSA_SEC
description: SIEM integration, threat intelligence sharing with NCA, security automation, and vulnerability management.

name: KSA_COM
description: Regulatory mapping to NCA CSCC, NDMO, and PDPL; audit logging; compliance reporting; and third-party attestation.

name: KSA_DR
description: Automated and tested backup and recovery for all critical systems and data.

name: KSA_NDM
description: NDMO: data governance framework, enterprise data catalog, data quality, data architecture, and interoperability.

name: KSA_NDP
description: Saudi PDPL and NDMO privacy: personal data protection, consent management, and data subject rights.

name: KSA_NDS
description: NDMO authorized data sharing between government entities and formal data sharing agreements.
